context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical knowledge template — lab-ingestion leg. Sprint 3: wire Sprints 1+2 into a new `bober medical import-labs <pdf>` subcommand + extracted runImportLabs(projectRoot, pdfPath, deps) core. FAIL-CLOSED FIRST: when the cloud-inference egress axis is off (default), print a clear message, set exit 1, and return BEFORE reading the PDF or building any client. When on: parse -> writeLabNote -> reindex -> dedup -> IDs/enums-only audit 'ingest' entry. Tests inject fake parser deps; no real network.

completedSprints.title: Lab-PDF parser
completedSprints.summary: parseLabPdf(pdfBytes, deps:{client,model}) in src/medical/lab-pdf-parser.ts returns a Zod-validated ParsedLabReport. Production client via buildMedicalInferenceClient(config, egress) in src/medical/inference.ts (cloud honoured only behind cloud-inference).

completedSprints.title: Lab-note writer + reindex
completedSprints.summary: writeLabNote(vaultDir, marker, meta) in src/medical/lab-note.ts writes <vaultDir>/labs/<panel-slug>/<marker-slug>-<date>.md. reindexLabNotes(vaultDir, store) in src/medical/lab-reindex.ts upserts into HealthDataStore.lab_results and RETURNS the genuine new-row count (0 for dups).

relevantFiles: src/cli/commands/medical.ts (runWhoopSync + WhoopSyncDeps pattern ~lines 30-121; dbPath wiring ~144-148; .action error handling ~163-171)
